# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

ZipFile: 'import boto3\nfrom botocore.exceptions import ClientError\ndef handler(event, context):    \n  s3 = boto3.client("s3")\n  sqs = boto3.resource("sqs").Queue(event["Records"][0]["s3"]["bucket"]["name"] + "-notification-queue")\n  bucket_name = event["Records"][0]["s3"]["bucket"]["name"]\n  key = event["Records"][0]["s3"]["object"]["key"]\n  try:\n    respo = s3.get_object(Bucket=event["Records"][0]["s3"]["bucket"]["name"], Key=event["Records"][0]["s3"]["object"]["key"])\nexcept ClientError as ce: \n  print(ce)\n  pass\nfor k in sqs:\n  sqs.send_message(\n    MessageBody=str(respo["ContentLength"]),\n    MessageAttributes={"MessageLength": {\n      "DataType":"String",\n      "StringValue": str(respo["ContentLength"])}},\n   )'
      Handler: index.handler 
      Runtime: python2.7
    Type: AWS::Serverless::Function
  S3ToSQSQueue: 
    Properties: 
      MessagesRetentionSeconds: !Ref RetentionPeriodInDays # Number of days for the messages in this queue to be retained after the last access.
      VisibilityTimeout: 
        Ref : VisibilityTimeoutInSecond  # The number of seconds for which a message received by a consumer is hidden from subsequent consumers
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue 
  S3ToSQSTopic: 
    Properties: 
      DisplayName: s3-to-sqs-topic  
      TopicName: !Join [ '','-', [Ref : BucketName], '-notification']
      # Role that grants permission for SQS to invoke this function. The role must have an action on `sqs:*` that matches the `QueueName`.
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic 
  S3ToSQSPolicy: 
    Properties: 
      PolicyDocument: 
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement: [
        {
          Effect : Allow 
          Action : sqs:*
          Resource : !GetAtt [ S3ToSQSQueue, Arn ]
        }
      ]
      Queues : 
        - Ref : S3ToSQSQueue 
    Type : AWS::SNS::Subscription
Resources:
  # Role that grants permission for SQS to invoke this function. The role must have an action on `sqs:*` that matches the `QueueName`.
  QueueRoleForSqsQueue:
    Properties: 
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument: 
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement : [
          {
            Effect    : 'Allow' 
            Principal  :  
              Service  : sqs.amazonaws.com  
            Action     : ['sts:AssumeRole']
          }
        ]
      Path        : /
      Policies    : 
        - PolicyDocument  : 
            Version       : '2012-10-17'
            Statement : [
              {
                Effect   : Allow 
                Action    : sns:*
                Resource  : !Ref S3ToSQSTopic
              }
            ]
  # Role that grants permission for Lambda function to call SNS
  RoleForSns:
    Properties: 
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument: 
        Version        : '2012-10-17'
        Statement : [
          {
            Effect    : Allow 
            Principal  : 
              Service       : lambda.amazonaws.com  
            Action         : ['sts:AssumeRole']
          }
        ]
      Path           : /
      ManagedPolicyArns   : 
        - arn : aws : iam : us-east-1 : acm-event-processor : policy / s3-notification-to-sqs
Resources:
  EventMappingForS3ToSqsQueue: 
    Properties  : 
      Events    : [ {"EventType" : "ObjectCreated:*", "DetailsType": "EventBridge"} ]
      Queue     : !Ref S3ToSQSQueue
    Type        : AWS::SNS::Subscription
  LambdaRole: 
    Properties   : 
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument    : 
        Version         : '2012-10-17'
        Statement  : [
          {
            Effect       : Allow 
            Principal     :
              Service      : lambda.amazonaws.com  
            Action        : ['sts:AssumeRole']
          }

    Properties   :

          Effect         : Allow

            - s3:*

            !GetAtt S3ToSQSFunction.Arn]

          { 
            Effect       : Allow 
            Principal      : 
              Service         : sns.amazonaws.com 
            Action            : ['sts:AssumeRole']
